title: TC009-putapisessionsidattendanceupdatesuccess
description: Verify that PUT /api/sessions/{id}/attendance updates attendance for a session and returns 200 confirmation.
code:
import requests
import datetime

BASE_URL = "http://localhost:5180"
AUTH_CREDENTIALS = {"Identifier": "admin@sessionflow.local", "Password": "Admin1234!"}
TIMEOUT = 30

def test_put_api_sessions_id_attendance_update_success():
    token = None
    group_id = None
    student_id = None
    session_id = None

    headers = {"Content-Type": "application/json"}

    try:
        # 1. Authenticate & get JWT token
        resp = requests.post(
            f"{BASE_URL}/api/auth/login",
            json=AUTH_CREDENTIALS,
            timeout=TIMEOUT,
            headers=headers,
        )
        resp.raise_for_status()
        token = resp.json().get("token")
        assert token, "Missing auth token"
        auth_headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {token}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}

        # 2. Create a group
        now = datetime.datetime.utcnow()
        # Prepare a valid group payload with Frequency=2 and exactly 2 schedules
        group_payload = {
            "Name": "Test Group TC009",
            "Description": "Test group for TC009",
            "Level": 2,
            "Frequency": 2,
            "NumberOfStudents": 20,
            "StartingSessionNumber": 1,
            "TotalSessions": 12,
            "Schedules": [
                {"DayOfWeek": 1, "StartTime": "14:00:00", "DurationMinutes": 60},
                {"DayOfWeek": 3, "StartTime": "14:00:00", "DurationMinutes": 60},
            ],
        }
        resp = requests.post(
            f"{BASE_URL}/api/groups", json=group_payload, headers=auth_headers, timeout=TIMEOUT
        )
        resp.raise_for_status()
        assert resp.status_code == 201
        group_id = resp.json().get("id")
        assert group_id, "Group creation failed to return id"

        # 3. Add a student to the group
        student_payload = {"Name": "Test Student TC009"}
        resp = requests.post(
            f"{BASE_URL}/api/groups/{group_id}/students",
            json=student_payload,
            headers=auth_headers,
            timeout=TIMEOUT,
        )
        resp.raise_for_status()
        assert resp.status_code == 201
        student_data = resp.json()
        student_id = student_data.get("id")
        assert student_id, "Student creation failed to return id"

        # 4. Create a session scheduled at current UTC time
        session_payload = {
            "GroupId": group_id,
            "ScheduledAt": now.replace(microsecond=0).isoformat() + "Z",
        }
        resp = requests.post(
            f"{BASE_URL}/api/sessions", json=session_payload, headers=auth_headers, timeout=TIMEOUT
        )
        resp.raise_for_status()
        assert resp.status_code == 201
        session_id = resp.json().get("id")
        assert session_id, "Session creation failed to return id"

        # 5. Update attendance via PUT /api/sessions/{id}/attendance
        attendance_payload = [
            {"StudentId": student_id, "Status": "Present"}
        ]
        resp = requests.put(
            f"{BASE_URL}/api/sessions/{session_id}/attendance",
            json=attendance_payload,
            headers=auth_headers,
            timeout=TIMEOUT,
        )
        resp.raise_for_status()
        assert resp.status_code == 200

    finally:
        # Cleanup: delete session if possible
        if session_id:
            try:
                requests.delete(
                    f"{BASE_URL}/api/sessions/{session_id}",
                    headers=auth_headers,
                    timeout=TIMEOUT,
                )
            except Exception:
                pass

        # Cleanup: delete group also deletes students presumably, else delete student first
        if group_id:
            try:
                requests.delete(
                    f"{BASE_URL}/api/groups/{group_id}",
                    headers=auth_headers,
                    timeout=TIMEOUT,
                )
            except Exception:
                pass


test_put_api_sessions_id_attendance_update_success()
